title: Armor Upgrades
description: More armors upgrades, alternatives to netherite!
body:
# Armor Upgrades [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/armor-upgrades?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/armor-upgrades) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE) ![bg](https://i.imgur.com/RnPT7Uz.png) ## 📖 Description New armors for vanilla minecraft! The new armors are `Fire`, `Ender`, `Prismarine`, `Dune` and `Sculk` armors, these new armors do not seek to create a tier more powerful than the netherite, they seek to add armors that modify other attributes so you can choose the armor that best suits your play style, that is, they are alternatives to the netherite armor. When a player obtains a diamond, they unlock all armor recipes! Also check [Shield Upgrades](https://modrinth.com/datapack/shield-upgrades)!
## ⚔️ Armors, Stats and Recipes All armors durability is the same as the diamond armor set, and the armor and armor toughness is an intermediate between iron armor and diamond armor.
Fire Armor Every armor piece have
  • +0.1 attack_speed
  • +1 burning_time

By having full armor you gain fire resistance effect and if any armor piece falls into the lava it will not burn, it will be glowing and will up to the surface.

🛠️ Recipe

Ender Armor Every armor piece have:
  • +0.01 movement_speed

If any armor piece falls into the void at the end, it will levitate in the air, will be glowing and will not be dispawned.

🛠️ Recipe

Prismarine Armor Every armor piece have:
  • +1.5 max_health
  • +0.25 water_movement_efficiency
  • +10 oxygen_bonus
  • +1 submerged_mining_speed

By having full armor you gain conduit power effect.

🛠️ Recipe

Dune Armor Every armor piece have:
  • +0.12 entity_interaction_range
  • +0.25 block_interaction_range

🛠️ Recipe

Sculk Armor Every armor piece have:
  • +0.75 attack_damage
  • +0.25 sneaking_speed

By having full armor you are immune to all bad effects.

🛠️ Recipe

## ⌨️ Commands Give: ```mcfunction /loot give @s loot armor_upgrades:/ ``` Give examples: ```mcfunction /loot give @s loot armor_upgrades:ender/chestplate /loot give @s loot armor_upgrades:dune/boots /loot give @s loot armor_upgrades:prismarine/all ```
